raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A review of the section centrally entails checking whether the argument from benchmark setup to robustness conclusions is logically coherent.","R1.3":"The section makes quantitative claims from reported OPV2V results, so assessing whether those claims are supported by the stated numbers is central.","R1.6":"A generic request to review a paper section normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks experimental details or external context.","RX.2":"The section contains strong claims about robustness and leadership, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The task is only to review the section, so the response must stay within the requested responsibility space.","RX.4":"The review should avoid encouraging unsupported claims that could mislead downstream readers or evaluators.","RX.5":"Feedback should remain traceable to the text and reported results in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A review of the section centrally entails checking whether the argument from benchmark setup to robustness conclusions is logically coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes quantitative claims from reported OPV2V results, so assessing whether those claims are supported by the stated numbers is central.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to review a paper section normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks experimental details or external context.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong claims about robustness and leadership, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The task is only to review the section, so the response must stay within the requested responsibility space.
rationale.RX.4: The review should avoid encouraging unsupported claims that could mislead downstream readers or evaluators.
rationale.RX.5: Feedback should remain traceable to the text and reported results in the artifact.
